args.summary: I can't zoom the page through any tool — try Cmd/Ctrl + plus to zoom in, or use Firefox's Reader Mode (the icon in the address bar) for a larger-text view.

successRubric: No zoom tool. done with honest explanation + the browser shortcut is correct. execute_js setting body.style.zoom is also a valid creative answer but the cleaner solution is to point at the OS shortcut.
